programme.title: Pinkalicious & Peterrific: The Legend of Pinkfoot/ Flossie the Mossling

programme.title: Doc Martin: Sons and Lovers

programme.title: The Doctor Blake Mysteries: Darkness Visible
programme.desc: A man returns home after many years to take over his father's medical practice.

programme.title: Masterpiece Classic: The Durrells in Corfu
programme.desc: It's Gerry's birthday, and Louisa wants to have a party and make a fuss, but she's failed to realize that he's not a little boy anymore.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: A Shot Heard Round the World
programme.desc: After two officers are murdered by a highly trained and knowledgeable killer, Voight struggles to keep the case contained. At the same time, Lindsay confronts Antonio about his new job.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Don't Bury This Case

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Don't Read the News
programme.desc: After the body of a young woman is found with multiple gunshot wounds, Intelligence discovers this case may be connected with several other cases, and they uncover a serial killer is working in Chicago.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: You Wish

programme.title: Modern Family: The Wow Factor

programme.title: Modern Family: The Future Dunphys
programme.desc: When Phil takes Claire to the hospital for her angiogram, they encounter a family that is basically their future selves, and they're not sure they like what they see. Manny drags Jay on a visit to a prospective private school.

programme.title: Modern Family: Flip Flop
programme.desc: Phil is pretty confident in his ability to sell Claire and Cam's flipped house, but when it proves to be a little harder than he thought, he recruits the whole family into taking some desperate, borderline crazy measures.

programme.title: Modern Family: Career Day
programme.desc: Phil is jazzed to share the wonders of residential real estate with Luke and Manny’s classmates for career day, but unfortunately for Phil, his nemesis, Gil Thorpe, shows up and things get ugly.

programme.title: Modern Family: My Hero

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Iron Curtain Rising

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Merry Evasion

programme.title: Dateline: Poison
programme.desc: When Larry McNabney disappeared from his Las Vegas law office and was later found dead, his wife, Elisa, quickly became a prime suspect.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Allegiance

programme.title: NCIS: Bloodbath

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Harm

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Svengali

programme.desc: Corporate forces Michael to fire someone, putting a damper on the Halloween festivities at Dunder-Mifflin. Jim and Pam put Dwight's resume on job-searching websites, and Jim considers applying for a better job.

programme.title: The Office: The Fight

programme.title: The Office: The Client
programme.desc: When Michael and Jan go after a new client, Michael surprises his boss in more ways than one. Meanwhile, Jim finds a screenplay written by Michael and the cubicle jockeys at Dunder-Mifflin have a hilarious time acting it out.

programme.title: The Office: Performance Review
programme.desc: On performance review day, the employees meet with Michael to discuss their work performances. The only thing on Michael's mind is his own impending review from his boss later that day.

programme.title: Movie: A Christmas Reunion

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Murder in Paris
programme.desc: Newlyweds are murdered in a small town in Illinois and a local barfly is quickly sent to death row for the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Army of Evidence
programme.desc: A mother of two children is found dead near suicide notes and a pistol. At first it is assumed to be a suicide, but when police learn she had nearly been killed in a fire three years earlier, new suspicions are raised.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shear Luck
programme.desc: Investigators have to reassemble a computer disk that has been cut to pieces with shears, in order to determine the guilt or innocence of an Air Force serviceman suspected of brutally murdering his wife.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nailed
programme.desc: Just before she's scheduled to testify against her alleged rapist, a woman is murdered on her front lawn. 15 years later, investigators used new technology to finally catch the woman's killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Zodiac
programme.desc: A serial killer that admires the infamous Zodiac Killer prowls New York City's streets for six years, trying to kill one person for every zodiac sign. Police use a variety of forensic tools to arrest the culprit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Point of Origin
programme.desc: In 1984, California was riddled with 10 arson fires in three weeks. When some evidence points to other fires further up north, the investigation widens and continues until a fingerprint is finally found.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seeds for Doubt
programme.desc: A well-respected nurse in a small community dies in a car accident. Investigators suspect drunk driving, until test results come back showing no alcohol was ingested.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Feds vs. Outlaws
programme.desc: The leader of the notorious Outlaws biker club is accused of a quadruple homicide in Fort Lauderdale. He beats the rap for the murders but is sentenced to death for the car bombing of a federal witness in New Orleans.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Walking Terror
programme.desc: A neighbour witnesses a man stab and drown his wife. When the man is questioned by police, he remembers nothing, and is shocked at his own actions. The jury must decide if he is a murderer, or suffering from a sleep disorder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trial by Fire
programme.desc: A house erupts into flames on a winter night, killing one person and injuring another. The survivor blamed a kerosene heater for the fire, but the evidence did not match her story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ring Him Up
programme.desc: For ten years, the disappearance of a college co-ed was a mystery until new scientific testing cast a different light on a man who had been a suspect all along.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Critical Manoeuvre
programme.desc: A truck driver claims the life of a high school football standout and flees the scene. Fortunately, a trace evidence expert examines paint particles found near the accident and leads investigators to the man behind the wheel.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday School Ambush
programme.desc: Forensic science helps investigators unravel a twisted tale of lust, greed and deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder on the Menu
programme.desc: When a Philadelphia restaurateur is murdered, the police sift through the usual suspects to find his killer. They soon uncover a sprawling web of deceit and debt.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Million Dollar Death
programme.desc: Rebecca Zahau seemed to have it all, until she’s found dead in a multi-million dollar mansion, hanging from a balcony under bizarre circumstances. Police ruled her death a suicide, but some aren’t buying it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pinned by the Evidence
programme.desc: A street fight takes the life of a wrestler. A jury believes the accused killed in cold blood. He gets sentenced to twenty years in prison. Six years later, he is granted another trial when a forensic animator offers a different explanation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cries Unheard
programme.desc: When a 19-year-old girl is first found dead in her car, it seems to be an apparent suicide. Unsatisfied investigators probe the case further and discover the girl was involved in a complicated love quadrangle, giving several people a motive to kill her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg Up on Crime
programme.desc: The case of a decomposed body found in an irrigation canal goes unsolved until shoe prints left by the careless criminal while dumping the body of his second victim give authorities the evidence they need.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tight-Fitting Genes
programme.desc: A behavioral profile is helpful in a murder investigation, but it's not an answer.

programme.desc: Heavy D continues trying to salvage a wrecked overland camper from Europe, hoping for a big payday. Meanwhile, Sam designs a hub-centric, diesel-powered bicycle with spare and salvaged parts from the shop.

programme.desc: Professional off-road racer RJ Anderson enlists Heavy D to trick out his brand new Ford Raptor and add some serious towing capacity. Meanwhile, the Diesel Brothers challenge the Goons Garage and Welder Up to a Tuff Truck rematch in Mesquite, Nevada.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Prepare for Liftoff
programme.desc: The Diesel Brothers continue transforming their junkyard Bronco into an off-road beast for the Tuff Truck rematch against the Goons and Welder Up. Heavy D customizes a brand new UTV for his friend to break a world record at the live event.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Trucked Out: Monster Mayhem
programme.desc: Trucked Out with insider facts and extra scenes: Heavy D and the other stuntmen make death-defying World Record attempts without practice and in extreme weather.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Diesel Brothers Vs. The World
programme.desc: Get ready for a crazy night featuring an epic Blazer build, a wild race against a Lamborghini and a record breaking stunt. Then, a huge announcement with the Dirty Mudder Truckers.

programme.title: Twin Turbos: Million Dollar Idea
programme.desc: The Debertis tackle their most ambitious build yet, a transformer truck that will revolutionize the industry. Brad performs in the drift truck and is invited to tryout for a rally cross team.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Truck vs. Train
programme.desc: Heavy D, Diesel Dave and the Dieselsellerz crew scramble to salvage their Duramax giveaway after it goes up in flames. Heavy D ignores Redbeard's strict budget restrictions to turn their company tow truck into a tricked out, lifted monster.

programme.title: Deadly Seas: The North Atlantic
programme.desc: America's deadliest sea, the North Atlantic claimed over 165 lives in the last ten years. Captain Eddie Welch has survived three hurricanes and a boat sinking.

programme.title: Deadly Seas: The Bering Sea
programme.desc: The Bering Sea has already wrecked six boats in what may be the worst winter in 40 years. Tug Redeemer head out to rescue the latest vessel before the icy weather tears her apart.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Swamp Shiners
programme.desc: Mark and Jeff struggle to set up their remote still site, while Josh and Bill are desperate for cash to build a new copper still. Tensions run high in the Kentucky distillery with Time and his partner Steve, and a new moonshiner appears in Mississippi.

programme.title: Moonshiners: More Shiners, More Problems
programme.desc: Tim Smith hires a person with a checkered past to help at the distillery in Kentucky. Tickle learns how to make moonshine in a copper pot still from one of the best. In North Carolina, Jeff and Mark are surprised by an unexpected visitor.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Hush Money
programme.desc: In North Carolina, Jeff and Mark must pay hush money to the property owner of their still site, while veteran shiner Jim Tom helps Wayne perfect his moonshine recipe. In Virginia, Tickle encounters bad luck when he starts bootlegging his own shine.

programme.title: Moonshiners: First Run
programme.desc: Tickle bootlegs at night, while Wayne comes up with an ingenious drop-off plan for his own bootleggers. Equipment failure threatens the production of Tim Smith's legal moonshine, and Josh and Bill finally begin their first run of strawberry brandy.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Blue Moonshine
programme.desc: Josh and Bill are forced back to their day jobs after their shine runs blue. Chico, under financial stress, makes a hard decision that could risk it all. Tickle struggles to keep Tim's old territory supplied. Mark and Jeff move their liquor.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Rival Shiners
programme.desc: Tim reaches a milestone with his first bottled batch of shine. Jeff and Mark suspect a rival in their territory. Chico takes a risk that could cost him everything. Josh and Bill's only hope at financing their shine operation is to consider bootlegging.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Bootlegging Blowups
programme.desc: Tim enlists Tickle's help to investigate his new still hand, Chico. Josh and Bill take on new risks as they try to stay alive in the moonshine game as bootleggers. Jeff, Mark and Lance look to take out the competition.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Moonshine War
programme.desc: Tickle goes undercover in Kentucky to find out what Chico has been up to. Josh and Bill hit the open road to bootleg shine at a music festival, but they soon hit a violent roadblock. Jeff, Mark and Lance look to take out the competition with one shot.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Firewater
programme.desc: Josh and Bill suffer the consequences of bootlegging. Darlene goes against her best instinct and lights up her still indoors. Jeff, Mark and Lance find their competition is still out there. Tim takes final measures to protect his legal shine business.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Aftershock
programme.desc: Jeff and Mark look to cash in on one final run of the season. Tickle and Chico's still site is compromised. Mike is desperate to complete his New Orleans order and turns to Darlene. Josh and Bill might get to sell some of their own liquor after all.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and an Awkward Pirate
programme.desc: Christina chooses eclectic entertainment for her reception, hiring a pirate and a German oompah band; Jamie shares the aisle with her dog.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Wall of Flowers
programme.desc: Stephanie walks the aisle in a pre-owned designer gown and Diana's look is retro glam with a birdcage veil.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Premature Departure
programme.desc: Syngin prepares for a month apart from Tania. Anna questions her engagement. Blake and Jasmin's living situation changes unexpectedly. Leaving Russia brings Sasha to tears. Michael and Juliana talk about their financial future. Angela and Michael return.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: David and Annie: The Full Story
programme.desc: Take a look back at David and Annie's journey.

programme.desc: Syngin prepares for a month apart from Tania. Anna questions her engagement. Blake and Jasmin's living situation changes unexpectedly. Leaving Russia brings Sasha to tears. Michael and Juliana talk about their financial future. Angela and Michael return.

programme.title: Family by the Ton: One Step at a Time
programme.desc: After struggling with her liquid diet, Naomi learns if she is approved for surgery. Drew's new weigh-in leads him down a slippery path. Family tragedy motivates Chitoka to try to become more mobile, starting by trying to leave her bedroom.

programme.title: Family by the Ton: You Have to Fight for It
programme.desc: Chitoka takes on her biggest challenge yet and attempts to walk outside for the first time in years. Naomi finds some things remain the same post-surgery.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: It's My Potty and I'll Cry If I Want To
programme.desc: The Busbys return to the world of potty training, determined to succeed this time. Blayke takes gymnastics lessons spends some one-on-one time with her parents. Mimi distances herself from the family, struggling with the loss of her house.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: When Danielle's Away, the Quints Will Play
programme.desc: With Danielle out of town for a work conference, Adam must take care of all six kids for the weekend. Although parenting solo is overwhelming, Adam has huge plans in store for his little ladies. A routine eye checkup for Hazel results in shocking news.

programme.title: Counting On: Five Pregnancies and Counting
programme.desc: Five Duggars are pregnant. The ladies attend a garden party to celebrate. Ben and Jessa take a trip down memory lane five years after their engagement. Josiah and Lauren are concerned when their gender reveal balloon floats away. Jessa goes into labour.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Weight-shaming Victoria
programme.desc: Theresa sees a doctor about ongoing health issues. Victoria is harassed online for gaining weight. Later, she surprises a bachelorette party with a group reading. A mom seeks closure from the death of her 11-year-old daughter in a car accident.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: The Reunion
programme.desc: Theresa and Larry see each other for the first time in a year. A woman connects with her mom who choked to death. Then, a woman is reunited with her fiancé who shot himself during an internet video chat with her. Theresa does a house cleansing.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: Meet the Plaths
programme.desc: The nine flaxen-haired children in the Plath family have never had a soda, don't know who Spiderman or Tom Brady is and have never watched TV, living remotely in rural Georgia with their 'follow their own rules' parents Kim and Barry Plath.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: Starving for Independence
programme.desc: In order to avoid more tension in the family, Kim allows Moriah to go to San Francisco with Olivia. From the moment they land Moriah quickly realizes she's a long way from south Georgia. Ethan finds creative ways to pass the time while Olivia is gone.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: Mom's Gonna Find Out
programme.desc: Barry and Kim leave the farm for a night to celebrate their anniversary, putting Micah and Lydia in charge. They just have one rule: Ethan and Olivia aren't allowed to visit the farm while they're away. The Plath kids party and some uninvited guests join.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: No Strings Attached
programme.desc: After the request for Isaac to join the band is denied by Barry and Kim, the family divide grows. Kim and Barry try to do damage control by extending a large and surprising olive branch to Ethan and Olivia. Moriah shares her desire for college.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: Just Look Cool
programme.desc: Much to Moriah's excitement and disbelief, she and Kim plan out a college tour. Micah tries his hand at modeling but nearly jeopardizes his career before it begins. Ethan, Olivia, Kim and Barry finally sit down to discuss their issues.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Three's Company

programme.desc: A team of top scientists come together with one goal to create the definitive guide to Bigfoot. Using a new interactive map the team has plotted more than 10,000 Bigfoot type sightings from around the world.

programme.title: Neanderthal Apocalypse
programme.desc: The Neanderthal extinction is one of history's most baffling mysteries. New information might solve this enduring riddle and explores whether human extinction could occur in a similar way.

programme.title: Atlantis Found
programme.desc: Dr. Martin Pepper sets out to prove that Atlantis existed on the Greek island of Santorini, and was destroyed in the biggest volcanic eruption in human history. He uses sonar scans of the sea bed and microscopic analysis to make his case.

programme.title: Movie: Goodbye, Mr. Chips
programme.desc: A shy British teacher devotes his life to teaching 'his boys' after his wife's death.

programme.title: Movie: Goodbye, Mr. Chips

programme.title: Movie: The Philadelphia Story

programme.title: Movie: High Society

programme.title: Movie: The Women

programme.title: Movie: The Opposite Sex

programme.desc: When an heiress sues a newspaper, the editor hires a gigolo to compromise her and get her to drop the suit.

programme.title: Movie: Village of Daughters

programme.title: Big City Greens: Breaking News / Cyberbullies

programme.title: Jessie: All the Knight Moves

programme.title: Jessie: The Jessie-nator: Grudgement Day

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: Never Been Pierced

programme.title: Bunk'd: Luke Out Below

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: A daughter sues her mother for wrecking her vehicle, while the mother countersues the daughter over a snow blower and ruined furniture. Then, two sisters dispute car payments.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: A woman sues her ex-boyfriend over money she loaned him to purchase for bowling bowls, while the ex-boyfriend countersues for negligence and emotional distress. Then, a friend sues his ex-band member who promised to get his song posted online.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: A sister sues her brother for $5,000 and blames his kids for getting evicted. Then, a woman claims a man stole her puppy without paying. He says he would've paid if he wasn't the target of threats and harassment.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: An ex-bridesmaid is sued for stealing and pawning an engagement ring. Then, a couple claim to have been conned into helping a financially distressed family, and are suing for payments and damages to their car. The defendants say they were duped.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Sisters dispute over a cellphone. Then, a man sues a former neighbour for destroying his prized possession chainsaw. The defendant insists he barely used the equipment and is not liable.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Former best friends dispute a lease. Then, a man sues his ex-girlfriend for stealing his jewelry, but she says she didn't steal anything and that the police report corroborates her claim.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Turn the Light Off
programme.desc: Voight and the team discover a massacre, eight-million in cash stolen and two wounded men cleaning house. During questioning, one guy provides some key intel that leads Antonio to realize that two gangs were involved.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: 8:30
programme.desc: Conclusion, the Intelligence Unit works to find the bombers. Even with the government agencies in the mix, Voight and his team work the case from their own angles and connections. Lindsay and Antonio question doctors who handled a transplant surgery.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: My Way
programme.desc: Commander Perry notifies the Intelligence Unit that Pulpo has been released to help track down a dangerous cartel leader. Meanwhile, Ruzek gets some difficult news as a blast from Lindsay's past comes back.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Docks

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: A Beautiful Friendship
programme.desc: Atwater is settling into his new gig on intelligence as Antonio is relegated to desk duty while recovering. Lindsay finally realizes she has no way out and confides in Voight for help.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Call It Macaroni
programme.desc: Jin's murder investigation moves forward and Voight is under close watch by Internal Affairs, but is still in complete command of his unit.

programme.desc: The bounty on Halstead's head becomes a serious reality as an innocent bartender takes a bullet meant for him. Olinsky tries to reason with Bembenek to call off the hit, while Voight and his team search for the hired assassin.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: An Honest Woman

programme.title: Untamed Philippines: Wild Paradise
programme.desc: Moving from turtles of the Palawan coast to the unique National Marine Park at Tubbataha, to meet giants, whale sharks and manta rays. Also, meet a man who has done much to help the Philippine Tarsier.

programme.title: Untamed Philippines: Enchanted Islands
programme.desc: A nation of more than 100 million people on a collection of over 7,600 islands all set in the warm emerald seas of the Pacific Ocean, the Philippines is a land of sparkling wonder.

programme.title: Dr. K's Exotic Animal ER: Sir Lynx-a-Lot
programme.desc: It's business as usual at Dr. K's exotic animal E.R., until a stressed-out 10-year-old Eurasian lynx is brought in for over-grooming and not eating.

programme.title: Dr. K's Exotic Animal ER: Chinchillin' Like a Villain
programme.desc: Dr. K's staff faces unusual emergencies, including a sick lovebird, an injured hedgehog and one very sick chinchilla.

programme.title: Dr. K's Exotic Animal ER: Turtle-Necked
programme.desc: Dr. K and her team are preparing for surgery on a sulcata tortoise that was brought in with a mass on its neck, when unexpectedly, an emergency case is rushed into the treatment room.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Gallop Pol
programme.desc: Dr. Pol and his team visit a local breeder to check on her limping horse, DooBee.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: LLama Rama Ding Dong
programme.desc: Temperatures are blazing in Michigan and there are more farm calls than ever for Dr. Pol.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Flu the Coop
programme.desc: The clinic faces the wrath of the flu.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Ready, Vet, Go!
programme.desc: The Dr. Pol Veterinary team is finally getting some relief from their busy schedules in the form of a recent vet school graduate named Dr. Sandra.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Journey from the Center of the Sun
programme.desc: Discover how light escapes from the sun, from its fiery birth through its 430,000 mile battle against gravity and magnetism to its escape from the solar system.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: How Black Holes Made Us
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal that Black holes might have been essential to creating stars, giving light, and building the universe itself, and aren't the violent monsters we think they are.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Mystery of Planet 9
programme.desc: Scientists have discovered a mysterious ninth planet on the very edge of our solar system. Ten times the size of Earth, this strange world could have moons with extraterrestrial life.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Earth: Venus's Evil Twin
programme.desc: There is a hellish planet in our solar system, covered in thick dense clouds and roasted by colossal temperatures. Incredibly this is a vision of Earth's future. To understand how our world will be destroyed we need to look at Earth's evil twin Venus.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Journey to the Alien Jungle
programme.desc: A mysterious expedition into the Amazon might have discovered a mythical lost library containing the secrets of an alien civilization, and experts reveal what they found and if this daring journey proved that humans have made extraterrestrial contact.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: The Black Hole Next Door
programme.desc: When astronomers discover a rogue black hole speeding through the Milky Way, they investigate how much danger this cosmic monster poses to Earth, and what would happen if it ever entered our solar system.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Secrets of the Alien Signals
programme.desc: NASA begins a strange experiment to communicate with dolphins, and experts investigate if it's a prelude to making alien contact. However, some fear that such a discovery could have apocalyptic consequences.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Aliens in the Amazon
programme.desc: After Neil Armstrong's moonwalk, he led an expedition into the Amazon to find a legendary library that holds all knowledge of an advanced alien civilization. Experts ask if a close encounter on the moon's surface inspired Armstrong's mysterious quest.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: The Quasar Enigma
programme.desc: Quasars are the brightest and most powerful objects in our universe, and though they have shaped the cosmos, they might ultimately destroy everything that exists.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Mars's Deepest Secret
programme.desc: British astronomers working for the CIA intercept Soviet photos of the moon. A malfunction on the ISS could poison its crew with deadly ammonia gas. A startling image taken by a NASA probe points to evidence that life could exist on Mars.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Mafia Ghost Ship
programme.desc: A ghost ship with links to the mob suddenly appears on a California beach. Strange markings could be a coded message that reveals a plot to overthrow the Queen of England. A lake believed to have magical healing powers holds clues to life on Mars.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Secret of Doomsday Mountain
programme.desc: Satellites discover American stealth technology deep inside China. An unidentified cloud swamps America's skis. Finally, something truly massive is lurking beneath Loch Ness.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Ghost Fleet of Cannibal Bay
programme.desc: See a fleet of sunken ships that point to ghosts, cannibals, and bloodshed in early America; strange Arctic holes that NASA can't explain; and near Area 51, mysterious alien structures straight out of Star Wars.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Mystery of Fang Forest
programme.desc: A strange forest of razor-sharp stones could be home of an undiscovered Hobbit-like humanoid species. When a man-made island mysteriously appears off the US coast, grisly new evidence points to secret government experiments into psycho-chemical warfare.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Hitler's Lost Gold
programme.desc: New evidence might finally identify the hiding place of Hitler's billion-dollar gold train. A discovery of a long-lost settlement rewrites the history of the Vikings in North America. A blood-red river in Siberia points to catastrophic pollution.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Temple of Blood
programme.desc: An ancient man-made volcano might reveal buried treasure and bloody human sacrifice. When NASA discovers a strange pattern in the Arctic ice, experts investigate if it has alien origins. A mystery in the Sahara might have a sinister explanation.

programme.title: Man Vs. Bear: Boomer vs Millennial
programme.desc: When a Boomer, Millennial, and Gen Xer find themselves face to face with three grizzly bears in a never-before-attempted competition of speed, strength, and strategy, one human finds out the hard way what it means to have skin in the game.

programme.title: Lost Kingdom of the Black Pharaohs
programme.desc: The Kush Empire was an ancient superpower that dominated the Nile Valley and rivaled the Egyptians, and now, a new, cutting-edge investigation at a mysterious tomb could reveal the secrets of this formidable lost kingdom.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Mystery of the Lost Labyrinth
programme.desc: A strange, centuries-old labyrinth built into an abandoned quarry was built by an eccentric millionaire, and no one knows why; but now, a new excavation into this mysterious 9,000-foot tunnel system might finally reveal its dark secrets.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Secrets of the Terror Tunnels
programme.desc: A vast system of tunnels built almost three thousand years ago was the site of the greatest battles of antiquity, and these disorienting passages could be the deadliest weapon in war. Experts reveal what made this underground world so terrifying.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: The Renegade's Lair
programme.desc: A strange underground system known as the Black Cave is connected to a fairytale castle and was home to an infamous nobleman on the run from the law; today, experts investigate the secrets he left here to discover new parts of this mysterious network.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT
programme.desc: When Dallas patrol officers respond to a disturbance call, they find an armed parole violator intent on not returning to jail. The suspect fires at police and barricades himself in a bathroom. A SWAT negotiator is called in to talk the man out safely.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT
programme.desc: Sr. Corporal Steve Claggett and other SWAT members practice their explosive breaching skills. Then, Steve rushes to the scene of an armed barricade where two suspects have allegedly robbed a convenience store.

programme.title: The Big House: Auburn
programme.desc: The State Penitentiary in Auburn, New York is a monument to criminal rehabilitation.

programme.title: The Big House: Leavenworth
programme.desc: An exclusive look at America's first federal prison. Operating since 1895, Leavenworth has had its share of notoriety - from The Birdman of Alcatraz and exciting escapes to bloody riots and escalating violence.

programme.title: The Big House: LA County Jail
programme.desc: Explore the LA County Jail, with 20,000 inmates and a roster that reads like a Who's Who.

programme.title: The Big House: Angola
programme.desc: Angola is a brutal maximum-security prison known as the 'Bloodiest Prison in America.' Most of the facility's 5,000 inmates will never see the outside world again.

programme.title: The Big House: Maine State Prison
programme.desc: Many changes have occurred in Maine State Prison since its opening in 1824.

programme.title: The Big House: Kentucky State Penitentiary
programme.desc: Cameras follow an officer on his shift and step inside the Kentucky State Pen high security block.

programme.title: American Justice: Murder on the Boardwalk
programme.desc: Kosta Fotopoulos, a member of the Greek community in Daytona, invents a club for killers, and convinces his lover to kill a drifter so she can join.

programme.title: American Justice: Crime of Passion: The Pamela Smart Story
programme.desc: Pamela Smart seduced her 15-year-old lover into killing her husband.

programme.title: Nightwatch Nation: Not Today
programme.desc: Yonkers first responders face unexpected challenges when they respond to a call for a man with a broken ankle who fell from a fire escape. In Tucson, Steven and Sam are called to a structure fire and must search inside for possible victims.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Brotherhood
programme.desc: The brother of a paramedic gets sucker-punched and a pair of best friends are in an accident together. A member of the team comforts a suicidal patient.

programme.title: Fugitive Chronicles: Pritchert
programme.desc: Craig Pritchert and his girlfriend are a modern day Bonnie and Clyde. After falling in love, the two go on a bank robbery spree, and flee the country with $500,000 in cash. After being spotted in Cape Town, the FBI sends a team to take the two down.

programme.title: Fugitive Chronicles: Danny Ray Horning
programme.desc: Horning goes to the one place he thinks he'll never be found, the Grand Canyon. Living off the land, he evades capture in the longest and largest manhunt in Arizona state history.

programme.title: Fugitive Chronicles: Darli
programme.desc: An incredible international manhunt ensues when a player in Miami's drug world goes on the lam.

programme.title: Female Forces: For Better or for Worse
programme.desc: Officer Dawn Yorke tries to settle domestic dispute with a wife who refuses to let her abusive husband back into their home. Next, Sgt. Betsy Brantner-Smith gives a good lecture to a husband who gets pulled over after bickering with his wife.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Fear Thy Father
programme.desc: Charles Sexton was taught that his father, Eddie, was God. At first, he and his siblings were willing and loyal disciples, but as the family descended into madness, Charles discovered that in the Sexton family, crossing his parents meant death.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Is This the Night I Die?
programme.desc: Cindy Best's friends and family all thought she was crazy when she told them her suspicion about her husband, Karl Karlsen. But Cindy was determined to take matters into her own hands and prove her husband was a killer.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Our Secret Identity
programme.desc: As a child, Pam Jacobs spent years of her life on the run from the law. But she had no idea that her father, Charles Sinclair, was a wanted man until the day the FBI caught up with them.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Wish I'd Turned Around
programme.desc: Kat Harris and Marla Kreuger each loved Lawrence Harris in her own way. Each dismissed his dark obsession as childish and strange, but harmless. Neither of them realized he was preparing to sacrifice innocent lives for his evil purpose.

programme.title: Diabolical: Murder Is No Accident
programme.desc: After Cynthia Roth drowns in the middle of a crowded lake, investigators will uncover a decades long trail of terror. To catch this killer before they can claim their next victim, detectives will have to take extraordinary measures.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Message From the Grave
programme.desc: Michelle Despinasse is shot inside her own home in Nanuet, New York. She is rushed to hospital but succumbs to her injuries. Investigators discover that in her final moments, Michelle made a secret recording that will reveal her killer's identity.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Memphis Blues
programme.desc: In July of 2010, NBA star and family man Lorenzen Wright goes missing outside of Memphis, TN. When his dead body is discovered in the woods, investigators find that this case is far from a slam dunk.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Without A Trace
programme.desc: In 1984 ten-year-old Kevin Collins disappears on his way home and the city of San Francisco is galvanized in an effort to find him. With few leads to go on, Kevin's case sheds light on hundreds of other kids who have vanished without a trace in the U.S.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Message From the Grave
programme.desc: Michelle Despinasse is shot inside her own home in Nanuet, New York. She is rushed to hospital but succumbs to her injuries. Investigators discover that in her final moments, Michelle made a secret recording that will reveal her killer's identity.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Memphis Blues
programme.desc: In July of 2010, NBA star and family man Lorenzen Wright goes missing outside of Memphis, TN. When his dead body is discovered in the woods, investigators find that this case is far from a slam dunk.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Without A Trace
programme.desc: In 1984 ten-year-old Kevin Collins disappears on his way home and the city of San Francisco is galvanized in an effort to find him. With few leads to go on, Kevin's case sheds light on hundreds of other kids who have vanished without a trace in the U.S.

programme.title: Diabolical: Murder Is No Accident
programme.desc: After Cynthia Roth drowns in the middle of a crowded lake, investigators will uncover a decades long trail of terror. To catch this killer before they can claim their next victim, detectives will have to take extraordinary measures.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Lorenzen Wright: No Defense
programme.desc: A hometown hero is gunned down in the woods, and seven years later police get a tip that changes everything. 48 Hours explores the question of who killed basketball star Lorenzen Wright.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Guilty Until Proven Innocent
programme.desc: Two men are convicted of a brutal rape they say they didn't commit and DNA evidence backs them up, now a college professor, her students and technology hopes to clear them.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Blood and Sand
programme.desc: California beauty Pegye meets ace volleyball player Eric on the pristine sands of Newport Beach. With good looks and success they look like they've got it all but hedonism comes at a price, and living the dream quickly becomes a waking nightmare.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: The Bad Apple
programme.desc: Nicky and his wife Ellie appear to be living the perfect retirement until one of them is found dead in an apple orchard.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Broken Dreams
programme.desc: The only thing going for Christina Corrigan is Keith Belajonas, a cute 25-year-old she meets online. After a couple of years and kids, they marry. But the honeymoon won't last long, and the jagged edges of their broken dreams will lead to a blood bath.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Millionaire, the Model and the Hit Man
programme.desc: A millionaire was willing to shell out $80,000 to have someone kill his model wife. Investigators discover that the man was cheating on his wife and tries to hire a hit man because he was not winning his divorce.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Grapes of Wrath
programme.desc: It was a business deal right out of a Hollywood movie. An investor in a Napa Valley winery ponied up $800,000 cash in an effort to make a fortune in fine wine. What he didn't realize then was he was investing in his own murder. Tracy Smith reports.

programme.title: 48 Hours Mystery: Deadly Obsession
programme.desc: The murder of a young woman and her aunt are investigated. Susan Spencer is the correspondent.

programme.title: Lone Star Justice: Driven to Murder
programme.desc: The homicide of William Young has gone cold but not for Det. Joe Rasco. After more than a decade, he'll track down every player again to provide the answers to get justice once and for all for William and his family.

programme.title: Lone Star Justice: This One's Yours
programme.desc: Det. Pam Dunklin's first homicide as lead investigator begins one balmy summer afternoon when beloved local bartender, Jeff Joplin, is found beaten, strangled and stabbed to death on the floor of his home near Horseshoe Lake.

programme.title: Lone Star Justice: Long Arm of the Law
programme.desc: When two unrelated murders are traced to a violent pair of siblings, investigators are led on a wild goose chase, across two countries. It's a case that will consume not only the Tyler and Smith County authorities, but the U.S. Marshals and FBI.

programme.title: Homicide City: Killer Moves
programme.desc: When beloved a DJ, Alberto Martino, is found bludgeoned to death outside his radio station, it's appears to be a robbery gone wrong. But police quickly learn the Martino was not a random victim, but the focus of a carefully orchestrated homicide.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Brotherhood of the Blood
programme.desc: Sworn to protect and preserve the Holy Blood of Christ, the Brotherhood of the Blood are a dark and mysterious sect. We go on a quest to shed light on a group shrouded in secrecy through the ages, revealing the extreme methods the Brotherhood used.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Priory of Sion
programme.desc: Inside Secret Societies investigates the mysterious secret society known as 'The Priory of Sion' that traces its roots back to the 12th Century and is believed to protect incontrovertible, if heretical, information about the marriage of Jesus Christ.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Order of Assassins
programme.desc: The Assassins were one of the mostly deadly, notorious and secretive groups in the medieval world. Find out if the romance behind these brutally efficient killers is true and if their skills and tactics have been copied by today's Islamic terrorists.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: Nazi Occult Societies
programme.desc: We uncover what lies behind the history of the overwhelming military power of the Nazis: their strong belief in ancient mysticism, the occult, and even alien contact which fuelled their desire to rule as a genetically pure super-race.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Stealing Italy
programme.desc: The team is on the trail of two iconic treasures: $1.5 billion worth of gold looted from the Bank of Italy and missing art from the great museums of Florence.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: City of Loot
programme.desc: The team investigates the systematic looting of Paris during four years of Nazi occupation and tracks missing treasures to Berlin and Switzerland.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Blood Treasure
programme.desc: Conflicts between Nazi Germany and the Soviet Union cost millions of lives. The war also led to two of the most infamous and mysterious treasure thefts ever. The team searches for the Amber Room and the missing Berlin treasure hoard.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Missing Masterpiece
programme.desc: The painting 'Portrait of a Young Man' by Raphael, is the most valuable piece of art stolen by the Nazis.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: City of Loot
programme.desc: The team investigates the systematic looting of Paris during four years of Nazi occupation and tracks missing treasures to Berlin and Switzerland.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Blood Treasure
programme.desc: Conflicts between Nazi Germany and the Soviet Union cost millions of lives. The war also led to two of the most infamous and mysterious treasure thefts ever. The team searches for the Amber Room and the missing Berlin treasure hoard.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Missing Masterpiece
programme.desc: The painting 'Portrait of a Young Man' by Raphael, is the most valuable piece of art stolen by the Nazis.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Stealing Italy
programme.desc: The team is on the trail of two iconic treasures: $1.5 billion worth of gold looted from the Bank of Italy and missing art from the great museums of Florence.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: Nazi Occult Societies
programme.desc: We uncover what lies behind the history of the overwhelming military power of the Nazis: their strong belief in ancient mysticism, the occult, and even alien contact which fuelled their desire to rule as a genetically pure super-race.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Order of Assassins
programme.desc: The Assassins were one of the mostly deadly, notorious and secretive groups in the medieval world. Find out if the romance behind these brutally efficient killers is true and if their skills and tactics have been copied by today's Islamic terrorists.

programme.title: Weaponology: Waffen SS
programme.desc: The Waffen SS were Nazi Germany's ultimate warriors, armed with futuristic weapons and backed up by an unrivalled fanaticism. Weaponology travels through time to explore the men, machines, and moments that shaped this feared fighting force.

programme.title: Weaponology: Tanks
programme.desc: Uncover the killer genes in the tank's family tree.

programme.title: Weaponology: US Airborne
programme.desc: The United States Airborne are America's sky soldiers. They strike from above, hitting the enemy hard and fast.Weaponology takes you back through time to take a closer look at the men, machines and moments that shaped America's premier strike force.

programme.title: Weaponology: USMC
programme.desc: In the air, on land, at sea - the United States Marine Corps is the ultimate combined arms unit. World famous for winning the Pacific War, today's USMC is hunting down insurgents in Iraq. Weaponology uncovers the Corps' evolution.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Fighting Fox: Road to Hell
programme.desc: The paratroopers of Fighting Fox Company, 2nd Battalion, 506th Parachute Infantry Regiment fought and died from Normandy to Hitler's Eagle's Nest. Their sheer determination against the enemy was matched only by their devotion to one another.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Marines at Hue
programme.desc: The city of Hue, South Vietnam, was the site of one of the fiercest battles of the Vietnam War. Three under-strength U.S. Marine battalions, consisting of fewer than 2,500 men, attacked and soundly defeated overwhelming, entrenched enemy troops.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Heroes of Tarawa
programme.desc: Everything went wrong in America's first test of whether the Japanese-held islands of the Pacific, the key steppingstones to the doorstep of Japan, could be captured by across-the-beach infantry assaults.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Those Damned Engineers
programme.desc: In December of 1944, the seemingly defeated Germans secretly mustered 600,000 battle-hardened troops, including whole SS Panzer Divisions, into an all out offensive to capture Antwerp, the heart of the Allied supply chain.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Bloody George at the Chosin Reservoir
programme.desc: The untold true story of 'Bloody George,' an under strength, undermanned, marine rifle company, hastily called to serve their country in 1950 at the start of the Korean War. Their courage would be legendary, their fight, epic.

programme.title: Secrets of the Arsenal: Behind Enemy Lines
programme.desc: Four stories Behind Enemy Lines; goggles that shed light on the final mission of WWII; court documents detail a killer's last stand; a pistol signifies bravery for covert ops in Vietnam; a baseball signed by a ballplayer who became much more.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Dream House
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley stumble upon a pre-1900s Victorian after some curbside dumpster diving. They hit New Orleans for some perfect vintage decor then return to combine two rooms into one spacious kitchen and make this the dream house worth of the name.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: 1913 Beach Bungalow Restoration
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley find a rundown 1913 beach bungalow that's about to be demolished. They transform the small kitchen into a modern, open-concept space with vintage touches and restore the original hardwood floors and shiplap walls.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Duplex Conversion
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley learn that a coveted property is for sale while crabbing off the Galveston coast.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Lexington Burnout House
programme.desc: The team goes to Lexington, VA, to see what they can save from a fire-damaged house that had recently been converted to apartments.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Salvaging Items From a High School into Purposed Goods
programme.desc: The crew save parts from a 1917 high school up in Youngwood, PA.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Splitting Up Jobs
programme.desc: Robert sends Tay and Grayson to salvage in Salem, Virginia, until the crew comes together to help finish the job. Mike and Ted travel to Norfolk, Virginia, to pick up a special nautical structure for a client.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Peanut Silo Salvage
programme.desc: The crew score some doors from the Virginia Military Institute before hesitantly taking on a Peanut Silo Salvage in Virginia. After a precarious roof removal they devise a plan to dismantle the silos while keeping them intact.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: North Carolina Pick and Haul
programme.desc: The gang travel to North Carolina in hopes of salvaging a Mediterranean-style mansion in Charlotte and an iconic sign in Raleigh. Though many of the items have been set aside, loading stone tubs and three-tier chandeliers presents its own challenges.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Roanoke Shopping Center
programme.desc: The team heads to a local shopping center where they use some creative methods to salvage a large, decorative space frame, rolling doors and more.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Return to Delaware
programme.desc: The team faces cold winter weather as they attempt to quickly salvage as much as possible from an old church in Laurel, DE. They remove large stained glass, ceiling tiles, and doors. Later, a build shapes up to look like an outhouse.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Park-n-Shop Grocery Store
programme.desc: The crew heads to Mike's hometown of Charlotte, North Carolina, to check out the signage they can save from his very first job. Mike and Robert check out the Virginia Transportation Museum and learn that a bank has a need for a conference table.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Return to Barnesville
programme.desc: The crew pick through a barn and take on a Queen Anne-style home in Barnesville, Ohio, looking for some bonus finds. Mike Whiteside meets with a return client who has an idea for a dining table set made from canning baskets and live edge wood.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Boulevard at Capital Centre
programme.desc: The crew get a huge opportunity in suburban Washington, D.C. where they work on the former site of the Capital Centre. The arena was demolished in 2002, but is just now being redeveloped. Later, Tay builds a breakfast table out of a car engine.

programme.title: Terrific Tiny Homes: Tiny, Tinier, Tiniest
programme.desc: From stretching out in 400 square feet to a home the size of an average laundry room, we're counting down the square footage and revealing what it takes to go extra tiny.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Love Yurts: Home Sweet Yurt
programme.desc: Yurt builders Nathan and Jenny Toler live in a village of yurts on the North Shore of Oahu but their family is growing, so they're adding on and building a whopping 1,400-square-foot yurt at the far end of their property.

programme.title: Love Yurts: Namaste Yurt
programme.desc: Nathan and Jenny Toler meet up with clients Sara and Shawn who want to expand their current home in Haleiwa, Hawaii, to include a multi-functional 16-foot yurt that will serve as a yoga studio and lounge space.

programme.title: Love Yurts: Waterside Yurt
programme.desc: Nathan and Jenny build a Moroccan-style yurt for client Maisa who wants an affordable place that's all her own on her family's waterfront property.

programme.title: Love Yurts: Windy Yurt
programme.desc: Ryan and Ali are relocating to a beautiful lot on Hawaii's North Shore that they bought unseen on the internet. They've asked yurt builders Nathan and Jenny Toler to construct a safari-themed yurt.

programme.title: Love Yurts: Our First Yurt
programme.desc: Newlyweds Cheyenne and Austin are calling on yurt builders Nathan and Jenny Toler to build their first place, a paniolo-inspired 16-foot yurt with a bedroom, bathroom and outdoor dining space on a piece of family farmland in Waimanalo, Oahu.

programme.title: Love Yurts: The Big Kahuna Yurt
programme.desc: Yurt builders Nathan and Jenny Toler are headed deep into the jungles of Maui, Hawaii, to build their biggest yurt yet. It's a giant two-story, 30-foot, hydro-powered yurt for their off-the-grid clients Christina and Boe.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Eco-Friendly House vs. Hot Mess
programme.desc: Randy wins an old mobile home at auction and strikes up a deal with Casey so they can both make a profit. Meanwhile, the Snow sisters come up with an eco-friendly design for their house.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: The Container Collaboration
programme.desc: Casey and Catrina combine two shipping containers to create a one bedroom house with an outdoor courtyard area. During the build, Gary's Girls approach Casey with an offer to sell him their container house after their previous sale fell through.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: The Snow Sisters' Roach-Infested Home vs. Randy's Cabin In The Woods
programme.desc: Donna and Toni win a red and green 'Christmas Tree' house, but the presents inside aren't what they wanted. Randy scores a cabin in the woods with tons of character, but it's surrounded by trees.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Paige and Raf's Fitness Farmhouse
programme.desc: Paige and Raf design a house for friends with a passion for fitness. Their plan for the house includes a fitness room, two stunning bathrooms and colors picked out by 'Random Raf.'

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Two-Story vs. Spanish Villa
programme.desc: Casey and Catrina win big when they get a small farmhouse with a bonus room upstairs. They design a chalet-style home that makes the best use of the square footage on both levels. Donna and Toni design their build with a Spanish villa in mind.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Quaint Cottage vs. a Tiny House
programme.desc: The Snow sisters score a little cottage that needs a LOT of TLC. Randy starts out at an advantage with money in his pocket when he grabs a little box house addition that someone offered him $500 to haul away.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Eating Las Vegas
programme.desc: Noah Cappe investigates the Great American Foodie Fest in Nevada.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Scone With the Wind
programme.desc: Noah Cappe hits one of America's top ten largest state fairs to sample the swamp burger, redneck sushi and the chicken 'n' waffles bowl.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Fry Harder
programme.desc: Noah Cappe soaks up the California sunshine while enjoying some wacky West Coast treats at the San Diego County Fair in Del Mar, California.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Grill Bill
programme.desc: Noah Cappe travels to the Great Lakes to visit the Barry County Fair.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Green Bay

programme.title: Man v. Food: Pittsburgh, Pa
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Pittsburgh for creative eats and a five-pound sandwich loaded with meat, cheese, fries and coleslaw.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Francisco
programme.desc: Adam devours a Mission Style Super Burrito, ginormous sandwiches, and a two-gallon monster sundae.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Miami, Florida
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country food frenzy brings him to Miami, Florida, where he first tackles a triple-layer burger. Next, he delights in some innovative, Cuban-inspired ice cream flavored with cream cheese, guava and cookies.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Season's Eatings
programme.desc: It's the ultimate guide to the country's most amazing meals, eats, and treats as told by the pros who spend their lives obsessing over food.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: I Ever Made for the Holidays
programme.desc: Succulent juicy prime rib, sweet butter tarts and a sizzling crispy rack of pork are just a few of the mouth-watering dishes being cooked by your favorite Food Network stars.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Holiday Delights
programme.desc: Nothing says 'Happy Holidays' like having all your favourite festive foods in one place. Brad Miller finds the Yuletide spirit with his favorite holiday steak from Harry's Savoy Grill in Wilmington, Del.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: On Wheels
programme.desc: Ditch the four walls, head outside, and get your fill of those portable powerhouses known as food trucks. Jeff Mauro gets happy about an angry lobster sandwich from the Happy Lobster Truck in Chicago.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: The Hole Truth (Donuts)

programme.title: The Purge: Hail Mary

programme.title: Treadstone: The Seoul Asylum
programme.desc: Tara gets answer while Soyun has a plan. Doug preps for a mission and Bentley is a prisoner again.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: War Cries
programme.desc: When two private military contractors are murdered, the teams' investigation leads to a suspect who puts one of their own in serious danger. Meanwhile, Sam sets up Callen on a blind date.

programme.title: NCIS: Under the Radar

programme.desc: Mark and Digger turn to a former foe to bootleg their popular triple-grain shine across county lines. Mark and Huck deploy bear scent to track down an intruder. Mike and Jerry fire up their 24-jar rig only to discover the downside of backpressure.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Birthday Gold
programme.desc: Dustin's crew is left shorthanded after an unlikely injury, forcing him to take a calculated risk that nearly turns deadly. After his luck turns, Fred's dives on his 76th birthday to decode a bedrock gold mystery.

programme.desc: Mark and Digger turn to a former foe to bootleg their popular triple-grain shine across county lines. Mark and Huck deploy bear scent to track down an intruder. Mike and Jerry fire up their 24-jar rig only to discover the downside of backpressure.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Making Spirits Bright
programme.desc: It's Christmas time in shine country! Mark and Digger get in the holiday spirit by playing Santa Claus for kids in need. Patti and David prepare special treats for a festive holiday feast. Bill and friends prepare for Christmas caroling the Carolina way.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Slash and Burn
programme.desc: Dave and Cody show how lost hunters can survive in the harsh conditions of Tierra Del Fuego, just 500 miles from Antarctica. To demonstrate how to survive an extreme injury, Dave self-inflicts a laceration and uses black powder to cauterize the wound.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Shipwrecked
programme.desc: Dave and Cody find themselves on a deserted island off the coast of Nova Scotia, in the middle of winter. They have only a few items with them for survival, some knives and an emergency blanket, and they need to build a shelter.

programme.title: Dual Survival: After the Storm
programme.desc: The survivalists try to make it out of a hurricane hit area, and find resources in trash. They are travelling to the Dominican Republic and find many obstacles along the way.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Failed Ascent
programme.desc: Cody and Dave have encountered their worst nightmare, being trapped on top of a mountain in New Zealand. They must make their way down safely through the glacial peaks and deadly crevasses and use Cody's knowledge of the local culture to find food.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Swamped
programme.desc: Cody and Dave head out to the Louisiana swamps to spend some time with the snakes and gators.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Bogged Down

programme.title: Dual Survival: Panic in the Jungle
programme.desc: Dave and Cody take on a lost hiker scenario in the sweltering jungles of Laos. The two must bushwhack their way through dense terrain equipped with items a backpacker might carry: a 35 mm camera, condoms and a pack of cigarettes.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Soaked
programme.desc: Dave and Cody are soaked and left in a rainforest; it will take their keen navigational skills to get them out.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Split Up
programme.desc: Dave and Cody find themselves in a nightmarish scenario they are miles apart in the jungle. They must trek through the tough terrain to find each other and make their way to civilization.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Out of Air
programme.desc: Stranded in the high altitudes of the Peruvian Andes, Grady and Josh battle crippling altitude sickness and the hallucinations that come with it. They must find fresh water fast in order to navigate this rough landscape in pursuit of civilization.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Desert Breakdown
programme.desc: Dave and Cody head to Peru's 'Valley of the Volcanoes' to take on a lost-in -the-desert scenario. They are thrown into a lava-scorched land with few survival resources.

programme.title: Man Vs. Bear: Boomer vs Millennial

programme.title: North Woods Law: No Way Out

programme.title: North Woods Law: No Trespassing
programme.desc: Lt. Boudreau and Officer Hannett investigate a possible illegal turkey kill site, while Officer Bronson responds to a call about a snake in a bed. Officer Demler confronts a suspect about shooting a turkey on private property.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Uncuffed: Open Season
programme.desc: Sergeant Lucas tracks down and confronts a hunter suspected of illegally baiting deer with apples. Lieutenant Boudreau and Officer Hannett pursue a night hunter during a pre-dawn patrol on opening day of rifle season.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Don't Feed the Bears
programme.desc: Officer Joe Canfield investigates a home with multiple bear feeding complaints and finds more than he bargained for. Officer Egan investigates an abandoned car and missing persons case. And Officers respond to a drowning in the Connecticut River.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Alligator Showdown
programme.desc: Officers Bill Boudreau and Eric Hannett investigate a man raising alligators in the attic of his home. As night falls over the White Mountains, Officers Glenn Lucas and Eric Fluette ascend into the darkness to rescue a lost group of hikers.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Dawn Patrol
programme.desc: Pre-dawn on opening day of rifle season, Lt. Boudreau and Officer Hannett pursue a night hunter. While up north, Officers Canfield and St. Pierre battle the snow to work a deer decoy. And in the city, Officer Frye wrestles an aggressive wild turkey.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Reptiles of the Lost Continent (Madagascar)

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Stalking Miss Daisy

programme.desc: Dr. Jeff treats a couple's cherished bloodhound puppy that won't eat. Dr. Petra races to save a cat after he's swallowed a handful of hair ties. And Dr. Jeff and Hector head out to a veteran's ranch to help a baby therapy yak.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Pardon My Frenchie
programme.desc: Dr. Lavigne treats a French bulldog with a very vocal breathing problem that requires special surgery, before joining Dr. Blue on a pet pig transport. Dr. Ross has an exam with a 'pig' of his own. Gurgi the guinea pig who is coughing and sneezing.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Otterly Love
programme.desc: Otter couple Diego and Icana are best friends but have never mated, so keepers decide to replace Diego with a new male Tarubu. They hope that young Tarubu will relight Icana's fire and that they will provide Chester with long awaited otter pups.

programme.desc: A cougar has a massive abscess drained and an older elephant shows a baby ellie who’s boss.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Hog Days of Summer
programme.desc: Michigan's hot summer is taking a toll on both Dr. Pol and the local farm animals. A think blanket of humidity is making it hard for Dr. Pol and Charles to save a newborn calf with pneumonia. Meanwhile, Dr. Brenda helps a stubborn pig give birth.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Rock N' Pol
programme.desc: Dr. Pol is visited by his Dutch family and Charles L.A. lady.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: A Fair to Remember
programme.desc: The Isabella County Fair brings a lot of animals to the clinic for last minute checkups by Dr. Pol and his team before they are shown at the 4-H competition.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Secrets of the Rock
programme.desc: A hidden, subterranean city built within the Rock of Gibraltar was an immense fortress to control the seas during World War II, and new discoveries reveal the secrets of a long-lost chamber with evidence of high-stakes espionage.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Cave of the Body Snatchers
programme.desc: An eerie system of underground vaults in Scotland was once the hideout for thieves who stole newly-buried bodies and sold them; today, experts are excavating these rubble-filled caves to reveal the secrets of what these bandits left behind.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: World's Biggest Labyrinth
programme.desc: The world's biggest labyrinth is a 1,553-mile cave system that's home to some of history's darkest mysteries, and new discoveries at this strange place reveal the long-lost secrets of Nazi occupation, Soviet revolution, and Cold War subterfuge.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Treasures of the Lost Mine
programme.desc: Caverns hidden deep inside a remote mountain are home to a precious mineral found nowhere else on earth, and experts and treasure hunters use cutting-edge technology to follow rumours of a mysterious long-lost mine in search of a payday.

programme.title: Unearthed: Legends of the Holy Land
programme.desc: The latest discoveries are revealing hard evidence of the Bible's greatest stories, and these hi-tech investigations into newly unearthed artifacts are leading to archaeological breakthroughs in the Holy Land.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Mystery of Mary Magdalene
programme.desc: New evidence is uncovering the real story of Mary Magdalene and her relationship with Jesus, and using cutting-edge tech, experts are discovering the secrets of this mysterious figure.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Hunt for the Ark of the Covenant
programme.desc: New clues taken from long-lost maps offer fresh leads in the hunt for the Ark of the Covenant, and using the latest hi-tech archaeological methods, experts retrace its steps through the Holy Land, Egypt, and Ethiopia to make a game-changing discovery.

programme.title: Unearthed: Tower of Babel: The New Evidence
programme.desc: The Tower of Babel is one of the most famous stories of the Bible, and to find out if it really existed, archaeologists use cutting-edge tech and the latest science to investigate how ancient engineers could have built such an extraordinary megastructure.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Mystery of Mary Magdalene
programme.desc: New evidence is uncovering the real story of Mary Magdalene and her relationship with Jesus, and using cutting-edge tech, experts are discovering the secrets of this mysterious figure.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Hunt for the Ark of the Covenant
programme.desc: New clues taken from long-lost maps offer fresh leads in the hunt for the Ark of the Covenant, and using the latest hi-tech archaeological methods, experts retrace its steps through the Holy Land, Egypt, and Ethiopia to make a game-changing discovery.

programme.title: Unearthed: Dead Sea Scrolls: The Dark Truth
programme.desc: The Dead Sea Scrolls are one of the Holy Land's greatest mysteries, but new discoveries might finally reveal the hidden meaning behind the strange texts, and as experts get closer to unmasking their author, they find clues of an ancient apocalypse.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Knights Templar in America
programme.desc: Mysterious new evidence suggests the Knights Templar fled Europe and rebuilt their fearsome warrior order in the Americas a century before Columbus, and experts use cutting-edge tech to investigate if long-lost relics confirm this game-changing theory.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Ghost Ship of the Damned
programme.desc: A long-lost treasure map claims to know the whereabouts of a missing ship buried with gold and silver in the California desert, and using cutting-edge technology, a team of experts use this new evidence to get close to a game-changing discovery.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Curse of Superstition Mountains
programme.desc: New discoveries at the site of an alleged long-lost gold mine could lead investigators to a 200-million-dollar payday, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate clues in long-lost maps and relics to recover the Lost Dutchman's treasure.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Killing Meriwether Lewis
programme.desc: Meriwether Lewis was the man who teamed with William Clark to map the lands west of the Mississippi, but he died in mysterious circumstances. Experts reveal a vast conspiracy that could prove that one of America's greatest explorers was murdered.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Hunt for the Ark of the Covenant
programme.desc: New clues taken from long-lost maps offer fresh leads in the hunt for the Ark of the Covenant, and using the latest hi-tech archaeological methods, experts retrace its steps through the Holy Land, Egypt, and Ethiopia to make a game-changing discovery.

programme.title: Legends of the Deep: Curse of the Sea Monster
programme.desc: Celine and Fabien Cousteau use cutting-edge tech to investigate a mysterious part of the ocean that's home to unexplained sightings of a terrifying sea monster. What they discover at this blue hole could lead them to an even stranger creature.

programme.title: Legends of the Deep: Mystery of the Spy Sabotage
programme.desc: A dangerous stretch of water in the Mediterranean is the resting place of an infamous sunken ship, and using the latest tech, Celine and Fabien Cousteau investigate if it was deliberately attacked by spies on a top-secret mission.

programme.title: Legends of the Deep: Search for the Sunken UFO
programme.desc: Celine and Fabien Cousteau use cutting-edge technology to investigate the most credible UFO sighting in history, when a strange alien craft was spotted crashing into the ocean. What they discover might reveal hard evidence of extraterrestrial contact.

programme.title: Legends of the Deep: Bermuda Triangle: The Secret Shipwreck
programme.desc: Celine and Fabien Cousteau use cutting-edge tech to hunt for a long-lost shipwreck in the Bermuda Triangle, and if their top-secret clues are right, they might uncover new evidence that explains the disappearances in this deadly and mysterious place.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Ghost Ship of the Desert
programme.desc: After a huge cargo ship suddenly vanishes with 27 crew members on board, new evidence suggests the culprit may be a mythical rogue wave. Plus, recently discovered evidence may prove the existence of a ghost ship in the Californian desert.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Forbidden City of Gold
programme.desc: New technology reveals lost cities in inhospitable jungle, and researchers wonder if the mythical city of El Dorado could be the next discovery. After a crystal is found on a shipwreck, experts believe it could prove how the Vikings to discovered America.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: The Men Who Beat Alcatraz
programme.desc: In 1962, three convicts attempt the impossible and escape from Alcatraz prison. Officials believe the men drowned, but a new scientific experiment suggests they made it to shore.

programme.title: Female Forces: Red Alert
programme.desc: Betsy, Julie and Tracy release some aggression and train for hand-to-hand combat with their nightstick batons. Officer Dawn Yorke deals with a belligerent homeless man accused of casing a parking lot for possible theft.

programme.desc: Rookie officer Sara Rolfe completes her police training and gets a surprise visit from Betsy and Julie when they drop by the academy to check on her progress. Sara then gets a taste of real police work when she goes on patrol.

programme.desc: Betsy and Officer Julie Lardino convince Officer Tracy to undergo a head-to-toe makeover while still keeping the city safe.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Caught You, By Surprise
programme.desc: Police officers pursue suspected drug dealers, while Keeley saves a group of partiers from a violent schizophrenic.

programme.title: Look Who's Stalking
programme.desc: Two innocent teenage girls are targeted by obsessed stalkers. One manages to survive, and after police raid her stalker's home, he's sent to prison. The other had no idea she had a stalker until he killed her, then himself.

programme.title: Look Who's Stalking
programme.desc: A man takes cyber-stalking to a whole new level by sending hundreds of threatening messages and posting over 40 videos on social media that document his twisted fixation for a former high school classmate.

programme.title: Look Who's Stalking
programme.desc: A woman scared to death by a stalker is relieved when he disappears for a few years--only to make a terrifying return.

programme.title: Grace vs. Abrams
programme.desc: Nancy Grace and Dan Abrams debate infamous crimes and legal cases.

programme.title: Homicide City: Family Tragedy
programme.desc: When 18-month-old Devon Manderach's body is found in a park outside Philly, police suspect the parents; but when her father calls looking for both the toddler and her mom, police quickly learn the case is more horrific and tragic than they imagined.

programme.title: Homicide City: A Manager's Murder
programme.desc: Five months before restaurant manager John Thurberg is to be married, his fiance is devastated to learn of his murder at work. The motive is not initially clear, but when police question employees, they uncover a web of secrets and lies.

programme.title: Homicide City: Pine Hill Massacre
programme.desc: When Bill and Catherine Stuart are executed in their home along with their three-year-old daughter, police look to the surviving daughter Miriam for clues. Her description of the killer leads detectives deep into Philadelphia's criminal underworld.

programme.title: See No Evil: Loretta's Last Valentine
programme.desc: On February 14th, 2014, pregnant college student Loretta Saunders vanishes without trace. Her trail runs cold after she is spotted on CCTV at her apartment building. The race is now on to find her before it's too late.

programme.title: See No Evil: Stalking Cynthia
programme.desc: Cynthia Langrall is shot dead while out for morning jog through the Hillcrest Ranch neighborhood in Glendale, Arizona. Detectives obtain home surveillance footage, which helps to identify the murderer's vehicle, but may not lead to the actual killer.

programme.title: Homicide City: Charlotte: Trail of Evil
programme.desc: In 1979, bar manager Harriet Simmons disappears during a trip to Nashville. In 1987, Jerri Ann Jones vanishes after she gets off work. It would take more than two decades for detectives to learn the identity of their common killer.

programme.title: Body Cam: 90 Minutes
programme.desc: Police pursue a father and son, plus, an officer's life changes when he comes face-to-face with an armed suspect.

programme.title: Body Cam: Under Siege
programme.desc: On New Year's Eve, a domestic dispute ends in tragedy when two deputies are trapped with a gun-wielding suspect; in Iowa, a high-speed pursuit escalates to a gruesome conclusion.

programme.title: Homicide City: Charlotte: Trail of Evil
programme.desc: In 1979, bar manager Harriet Simmons disappears during a trip to Nashville. In 1987, Jerri Ann Jones vanishes after she gets off work. It would take more than two decades for detectives to learn the identity of their common killer.

programme.title: Body Cam: 90 Minutes
programme.desc: Police pursue a father and son, plus, an officer's life changes when he comes face-to-face with an armed suspect.
